title: The ABC Steps of Proposal Development & Grant Writing Professional Development — D-RED Panopto Sessions (Ofosu)
display_label: ABC Steps of Proposal Dev / Grant Writing PD Videos (2021-08-11, Panopto)
content: Two Panopto-hosted recordings from the 2021-08-11 Monthly D-RED Seminar, both presented by Mildred Huff Ofosu, PhD. (1) 'The ABC Steps of Proposal Development': https://morgan.hosted.panopto.com/Panopto/Pages/Viewer.aspx?tid=dbe1bb76-d05c-4a45-8629-ad9600e2e579. (2) 'Grant Writing Professional Development': https://morgan.hosted.panopto.com/Panopto/Pages/Viewer.aspx?id=8f7e70b9-0617-472d-96ed-ad9201655b5a. Both require MSU SSO login.
